title: Intricately Spiced Peruvian Fish Ceviche
description: A refreshing and flavorful Peruvian dish featuring delicate fish marinated in a mixture of citrus juices, spices, and aromatics, perfect for a light brunch, this floral and aerated ceviche is made with shallots and a hint of tadka for added depth
instructions: Cut the halibut fillets into small cubes and place them in a large bowl
In a small pan, heat the tadka oil over medium heat and add the coriander seeds and cumin seeds, letting them sizzle for 1 minute
Add the grated ginger to the pan and cook for an additional 30 seconds
Pour the lime juice, mixed citrus juice, and tadka oil mixture over the fish cubes
Add the sliced shallots, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and stir gently to combine
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the fish to marinate
Just before serving, stir in the chopped cilantro
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed
Serve the ceviche in small glasses or bowls, garnished with additional cilantro if desired
